text:
Published

on

By

Brazilian winger, Willian’s contract with Olympiacos has been terminated.

This was disclosed by football transfer expert Fabrizio Romano in a tweet via his X account.

Willian had joined the Greek club this year after leaving Premier League side Fulham.

However, the 36-year-old is now available as a free agent ahead of the January transfer window.

“Willian has just terminated his contract at Olympiacos, available as free agent,” Romano tweeted on Monday.

“Former Chelsea, Arsenal and Fulham winger will now be ready for new chapter.”

This is not the first time Willian has terminated his contract in his career.

He terminated his contract with Arsenal to join Corinthians.
